description: Plan-only migration policy for moving Sanguo-RAG run/review/incremental state to PostgreSQL after evaluation thresholds are met.

migrationSteps.name: Introduce read-only state repository adapter
migrationSteps.checkpoint: JSONL remains canonical and adapter reads mirror state only

migrationSteps.name: Backfill run history and review state
migrationSteps.checkpoint: Backfill report row counts match JSONL/manifest baseline

migrationSteps.name: Enable dual-write behind a feature flag
migrationSteps.checkpoint: Regression harness passes with JSONL and PostgreSQL mirrors equivalent

migrationSteps.name: Cut read path to PostgreSQL
migrationSteps.checkpoint: Rollback command and JSONL export mirror are verified

migrationSteps.name: Keep JSONL export as audit artifact
migrationSteps.checkpoint: Pipeline artifacts remain inspectable without direct DB access

nonGoals: No PostgreSQL dependency is added during governance planning.
No runtime output schema changes before adapter cutover.
No vector ingestion production rollout in this phase.
